title: Chefmakes' Sky Widgets
description: Add custom details to your sky without texture packs or losing performance!
body:
![TITLECARD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3d9c05b69e4de3122aeb605584fa2c81e97e570.png)

Huge shoutout to Deep-Fold for the sprites of the planets. You can check him out at https://deep-fold.itch.io/ . And if you want to make you're own pixelated planets and stars, you can check out his tool at https://deep-fold.itch.io/pixel-planet-generator.

![Deep-Fold's planet creation tool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7de128afe4d8ad0cf513405c65256a127bdb4d02_0.webp)

This mod adds "Widgets" to your sky without needing any texture packs or other mods. You have alot of control over everything. Most importantly of all, you can **ADD** your **OWN** widgets _dynamically_ as pngs/jpgs, gifs or even videos. It even supports green screen incase you can't find a transparent version, you'll need to add "**GN**" to your video file name so the mod recognizes it as green screen.

![mp4 green screen support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85523daf6922a0ed1db1ab5c6dfcaf4949072981.png)

All you need to do is to go to the "**skyassets**" folder inside your minecraft instance, and paste your image/gif/video inside the "**additions**" folder, then hit **F3+T** to refresh your textures and to reload it (yes it might take longer than you expect):

![folder1, skyassets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efc3330f1c72fc55cf1d576b3cd1742da9ba5203.png).\
![folder2, additions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4520dbe5ab0f5ac6ac3066e188a93e19f2ed180c.png)

Further more, you can control all the sky widgets from the Sky Widgets menu, Directly enabling/disabling them.

![the media menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19b30283f32fb23c4ff81a5090133af634e09c29.png)

Inside each entry you can control their values for their scale, poisition, rotation, and even things like what time do they show up at and which dimension.

![media properties menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1056c49393f1b1593162e3307af7807f44567aa.png)

You control the value via a slider for each entry, while also keeping the background transparent for better judgement.

![slider menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6626b3c11bf58257b53a76c16437f52dce0ade5.png)
